feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Supplier evaluation
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

I need to configure supplier evaluation in current system.

But I have no idea from where I start.

Please guide steps so that successfully create the same. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Adding new tabs in Manage Purchase Requisitions Professional
entry.content:
Need custom tab to display table information in Fiori app F2229. Please suggest recommended approach.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: HCM Processes & Forms: record several data records with one table
entry.content:
Hi you all,

I have a question about creating several qualifications via a table, for example.
So far, we have used the SAP-PA background service for this. We have created a process via HRASR_DT and also a form scenario. If you only want to enter one entry, it works, but if you want to enter more than one entry in the table, the second entry is overwritten and only one entry is posted in the background.


So if Quali 1 fields are in SAP_PA instance 1 and Quali 2 fields are in SAP_PA 2 instance, then it works - if both are in one then not, even when using different "Data record index" for these fields 

Do you have any Idea how i could fix that ? 

Thanks 
Dominik

entry.title: Side effects are not working on smart fields (Fiori Element + RAP)
entry.content:
We are developing a Fiori Element - List Report page application based on CDS annotations (following RAP development model). Our detail object page has multiple UI.facet as sections – SectionA, SectionB and so on. For some business reason we had to extend Object page Details view with a custom section at UI. SectionA is now a custom view at UI. Other sections(like, SectionB) are generated from CDS annotations(UI.facet).

Pic 1- part of manifest.json

Pic 2- part of View.xml  

Pic 3 - UI Detail Object page - Type field as highlighted

We have used UI control - smart fields for dropdown at UI so that it can act based on the service metadata. We have side effect implemented at backend on top of the drop down field (Type - smart field at UI). So that when user changes dropdown selection it triggers side effect. 

When we check the loaded meta data information from network tab, I can see the side effects are part of the metadata.

Pic 4- metadata loaded in network tab

Case1- The side effect does not work when SectionA is created at UI (and dropdown is a smart field). Side effect is not triggered. We checked after keeping a break point at SAP.

Case2- Side effect works perfectly fine when SectionA is generated using CDS annotation without any additional work.

It will be great to get some helpful inputs for the issue. Where to look for why the side effect is not triggering for Case1.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Problem while Fiori Development Setup in VS Code
entry.content:
Please help me resolve the following issues
1. I cannot open the Fiori application generator in VS Code.

2. Not able to add SAP System.

3. Blank Screen while installing generators for Fiori.

entry.title: SAP MY Inbox Issue with SAP Fiori launchpad multiple systems ( S4 ECC and CRM )
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Need your expert advice here please -

Background:

  • We  have one MyInbox and processes workflows initiated in CRM as well as S4.
  • CRM System Alias was used to enable one MyInbox for both the systems.
  • Realization today that a manager must have an ID in both the systems or MyInbox has errors.
  • We have many managers who do not have a CRM id
  • Managers are not real SAP users but they receive mail with a link which navigates them to MyInbox for approvals.

Plans:

  • Disable CRM Alias to allow Managers to approve S4 workflows
  • Copy MyInbox so we will have two MyInboxes (one for S4 workflows and one for CRM workflows)

Where we are:

  • CRM Alias has been disabled
  • We are having challenges creating a secondary MyInbox for CRM workflows

What is needed:

  • Requesting your help in how to create second CRM MyInBox  or suggest alternatives for CRM workflows. 

Thanks & Best Regards,

Sunit

entry.title: Proper way to extend standard Fiori app F2180
entry.content:
Hello community,

I recently received the requirement to add a custom field to standard Fiori App 2180 (Inspection Lots). It's the first time we need to extend such an app.

I read through so many blogs and found so many information about how to extend an app. But I'm lost and need help to judge what's the proper way these days-

F2180 is an app to manage inspection lots. I need to add a custom columns representing the user status (JEST, JSTO) for each inspection lot. I don't need to add this field to database table QALS as information already is available by default in JEST etc.

For a previous requirement, I already defined a custom CDS view which collects user status for any kind of object. This view ZI_USERSTATUS follows VDM idea, so it is basically only an interface view to JEST, JSTO Text and so on.

So now I'm looking for a proper way to add a column of ZI_USERSTATUS to F2180 app. We're running S/4 2023 FP1 on-premise.

Should I:

- add this as extension to VDM I_InspectionLot
- use Custom Field and logic app
- create an extension project using VSCode?

I tried to use custom field and logic app. First I note it is flagged as deprecated but I wasn't able to find its successor. Nontheless I first tried to create a custom field. As a result, I see changes to database table QALS for my new field. But this is not necessary imo as I don't want to add this field to database but to app only.
BTW: the system didn't ask for a transport request but instead added the changes to a temporary package. This feels not right to me.

Then I tried Datasource Extension as to my understanding, I can use this to add existing information. But I don't see how to add fields to InspectionLot. I can add fields or logic to associated objects but not to inspection lot itself.

 

Any tips how to solve this?


EDIT:
I was now able to extend I_InspectionLot by extending E_InspectionLot. My new field is now available in I_InspectionLot. Also I see it is available in SEGW of corresponding standard app



However it is still not available in "Custom Field and Logic" app. My assumption was to find it available in data source extensions. But there is no change in entity _insplot

What am I missing?
The app is based on consumption view C_Insplotmng, which contains E_INSPECTIONLOT. I might can go ahead and extend this view as well but then I don't understand what "Custom Fields and Logic" is good for.

entry.title: Migration of Custom Approve Purchase Contracts App (F0400) from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear folks.

I am writing to request technical support regarding the migration of a customized extension based on the standard Approve Purchase Contracts application (F0400) from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA. The application has undergone extensive customizations and we require guidance on the feasibility and process for its successful migration.

We would appreciate it if you could provide us with the following information:

  1. Migration Guidance: Is there a comprehensive guide or set of instructions available for migrating customized applications like ours to SAP S/4HANA? If so, please provide links or references to these resources.

  2. Migration Feasibility: Can someone confirm whether it is technically feasible to migrate our customized Approve Purchase Contracts application (F0400) to SAP S/4HANA? If there are any potential challenges or limitations, please elaborate on them.

  3. Migration Process: If the migration is feasible, please outline the general steps involved in the process. This would help us understand the timeline, resource requirements, and any specific actions we need to take on our end.

  4. Additional Resources: Can someone direct us to any additional resources, such as SAP Notes, community forums, or support articles, that might be relevant to our specific situation?

We are eager to embark on this migration journey and appreciate your prompt assistance in providing us with the necessary guidance.

Thank you.

Sincerely,

Christian Manrique

entry.title: Display of page map fails
entry.content:
Hi,

When trying to open the page map for my application I get only the following result:

In addition I get the error message 'EntryNotFound (FileSystemError): ftfs:/c:/Users/I023412/CALM/ptm-lib-ui/src/app.json'.
The application information is 'all green':

I wonder whether the problem is not due to the fact that project contains only the frontend of the application, i.e. the cap based odata v4 backend is implemented in a separate project. On the other hand, the application can be previewed without problem which makes me thing that this is a technical issue with page map application.

Best regards,

Axel.

P.S.: As the problem seems to be related to the manifest.json, I attach this file to the post.

entry.title: Getting an error while trying to run the task list SAP_ESH_INITIAL_SETUP_WRK_CLIENT.
entry.content: During the step Create and Index Connectors I am getting an error message saying 'Background job STCTM_20240723123215.0480230/18021500 is aborted; see task log for details'. The job is getting cancelled due to GETWA_NOT_ASSIGNED runtime error during this step. I am trying to configure Fiori system.

entry.title: Override back button on FLP
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to override the back button behavior on Sap Build Workzone. My application is Fiori Elements with Fiori Freestyle with odata v4. I want to raise an exception when a user is in the Object Page in edit mode and clicks on the back button. I tried the suggestions here https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/flp-nav-back-button-issue/qaq-p/12142325/comment-id/4538564#M4538564. But didn't work for me. I tried using this part:

this.getOwnerComponent().getService("ShellUIService").then(function(oShellService) {
    oShellService.setBackNavigation(function() {
        //either do nothing to disable it, or add your own nav back logic for having the navigation
    });
});

In the onAterRendering method of the Object Page controller, but it doesn't enter the setBackNavigation function. Can someone help with this issue.

 

Thanks,

Violina

entry.title: Order acknowledgment PDF opens in Browser in SCASE t code
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I was facing this issue in SAP Credit management, where while the user is releasing the order in Scase , the order acknowledgment is popping out in the browser in PDF format. this is happening for one particular Business partner , all the user in the team got affected , in the lower system (testing system) it is working fine 

I am not sure of the solution

 

#SAP FICO, #SAP SD, #SAP Credit Management, #SAP Basi

 

Could some please guide the solution on this ?

entry.title: Duplicate ID error while working with Adaptation project
entry.content: I have extended a standard Fiori application using Adaptation project. I extended the view and added a new section(fragment) and deployed to FLP.   How to avoid/clear duplicate ID error while navigating back from FLP and getting back into the app?

entry.title: VS Code Configuration - Error on Created Application during Data Source and Service Selection
entry.content:
There is issue with my Visual Studio Code, during the initial creation of Save System, I’m able to do the connection testing (using same username and password)

 

 

But upon login or trying to create the application using wizard we are facing authentication error on steps Data Source and Service Selection. 

its return Authentication incorrect! error message.

We already double check the user name and password , it match exactly with backend and we can login successfully also when trying to Save System config in VS Code 

 

Thank you.

#visualstudiocode
SAP Fiori for SAP ERP

entry.title: Fiori App F2359 Error: Target was not found
entry.content:
When opening Fiori App F2359 an error come up:

Target was not found 

sap.ui.generic.app.navigation.service.NavigationHandler is not a constructor

 

OData-services + SICF services were checked....also in F12 DEV mode of MS Edge.

Do you have an idea?

Thanks a lot.

Best regards,

Henning

entry.title: Replace standard message in Fiori value help dialog
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have a requirement where i have to replace standard error message with custom message which is displayed on value help dialog when there is no seached value is found .

i have used fragment to display the popup of value help

 

kindly share the solution.

<core:FragmentDefinition
    xmlns="sap.ui.comp.valuehelpdialog"
    xmlns:m="sap.m"
    xmlns:fb="sap.ui.comp.filterbar"
    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
>
    <ValueHelpDialog
        id="plantValueHelp"
        title="Plant"
        ok=".onValueHelpOkPressPlant"
        supportMultiselect="false"
        cancel=".onValueHelpCancelPressPlant"
        supportRanges="false"
        key="Werks"
        descriptionKey="Name1"
    >
        <filterBar>
            <fb:FilterBar
                id="plantFilter"
                advancedMode="false"
                useToolbar="false"
                search=".onFilterBarSearchPlant"
            >
                <fb:filterGroupItems>
                    <fb:FilterGroupItem
                        id="plantFilterGroup"
                        groupName="__$INTERNAL$"
                        name="werks"
                        label="Plant"
                        visibleInFilterBar="true"
                    >
                        <fb:control>
                            <m:Input
                                id="plantInput"
                                name="Werks"
                                submit=".onPlantSearchSubmit"
                            />
                        </fb:control>
                    </fb:FilterGroupItem>
                    <fb:FilterGroupItem
                        id="plantNameFilterGroup"
                        groupName="__$INTERNAL$"
                        name="Name1"
                        label="Name"
                        visibleInFilterBar="true"
                    >
                        <fb:control>
                            <m:Input
                                id="plantNameInput"
                                name="Name1"
                                submit=".onPlantSearchSubmit"
                            />
                        </fb:control>
                    </fb:FilterGroupItem>
                    <fb:FilterGroupItem
                        id="cityFilterGroup"
                        groupName="__$INTERNAL$"
                        name="City1"
                        label="City"
                        visibleInFilterBar="true"
                    >
                        <fb:control>
                            <m:Input
                                id="cityInput"
                                name="City1"
                                submit=".onPlantSearchSubmit"
                            />
                        </fb:control>
                    </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                    <fb:FilterGroupItem
                        id="countryFilterGroup"
                        groupName="__$INTERNAL$"
                        name="Land1"
                        label="Country Code"
                        visibleInFilterBar="true"
                    >
                        <fb:control>
                            <m:Input
                                id="countryInput"
                                name="Land1"
                                submit=".onPlantSearchSubmit"
                            />
                        </fb:control>
                    </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                     <fb:FilterGroupItem
                        id="companuCodeFilterGroup"
                        groupName="__$INTERNAL$"
                        name="Bukrs"
                        label="Company Code"
                        visibleInFilterBar="true"
                    >
                        <fb:control>
                            <m:Input
                                id="plantCompanyCodeInput"
                                name="Bukrs"
                                submit=".onPlantSearchSubmit"
                            />
                        </fb:control>
                    </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                </fb:filterGroupItems>
            </fb:FilterBar>
        </filterBar>
    </ValueHelpDialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

entry.title: How to use UploadSetToolbarPlaceholder in UploadSet?
entry.content: I am trying to use UploadSetToolbarPlaceholder in UploadSet. The description given in the documentation is not clear about how to use it in UploadSet. Can anyone please guide me on this?

entry.title: SAP trainings _previous work in SAP GUI (AP, CAP) +Tester
entry.content:
I am currently a UAT test analyst looking to improve/develop/enhance my skills in SAP field (maybe as an SAP consultant).

With over 5 years of experience in AP and Project Controlling in SAP GUI, I am currently involved in a transformation project from SAP ERP to SAP HANA until 2027/2028 within my employer, Allianz . During this project, I have gained experience in testing phases and managing business processes within feeders and SAP processes.

Could you recommend suitable training courses to enhance our existing knowledge in Testing and SAP Fiori/Hanna?

I have a budget of approximately 1400 EUR for courses. I am looking for paid courses to make the best use of this budget.

Thank you very much !

entry.title: Add custom field to F0718 - Post General Journal Entries Fiori App
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to add a custom field to the Fiori app F0718 - Post General Journal Entries using UI adaptation/In-app extensibility. We are on S/4HANA 2022 FPS02 Private Cloud.

I've created the custom field in the correct business context Accounting: Coding Block as mentioned in the app documentation

I've also enabled the custom field for the relevant OData of the app in the UIs and Reports section and published the field:

FAC_GL_DOCUMENT_POST_SRV

I can see that the field is published and is available in the backend.

However, when I open the app F0718 - Post General Journal Entries and enter the UI adaptation mode, there's no option to add this field or any custom field for that matter to the items section. I do not get the option to add a field when I click/right-click anywhere on the expanded items section.

Is there something more that needs to be done to be able to add this field to the app UI using UI adaptation for this app? Please guide.

@Jocelyn_Dart 

 

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Odata $batch with filter
entry.content: Hi, I created a simple odata using $batch with filter my problem is the IT_FILTER_SELECT_OPTION is empty what could be the issue? why its not populating the standard ITAB is there something wrong in my $batch?
